recommendations.title: Only You
recommendations.overview: The passionate love between a former boxer and a beautiful blind woman.

recommendations.title: Private Lesson
recommendations.overview: Posing as a private tutor, Azra secretly coaches students on achieving their goals in life and love — but not without a few bumps in the road.

recommendations.title: Kiwi!
recommendations.overview: The story of a Kiwi who spends his whole life working towards achieving his dream.

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: City Lights
recommendations.overview: A tramp falls in love with a beautiful blind flower girl. His on-and-off friendship with a wealthy man allows him to be the girl's benefactor and suitor.

recommendations.title: Blind Dating
recommendations.overview: Danny is a blind man who does not let his impairment get in the way of living his life to the fullest, except when it comes to love. Danny's brother sets him up on a series of blind dates, but all of them go disastrously wrong. Just when Danny is abo

recommendations.title: Cookie's Fortune
recommendations.overview: Conflict arises in the small town of Holly Springs when an old woman's death causes a variety of reactions among family and friends.

recommendations.title: Emma.
recommendations.overview: In 1800s England, a well-meaning but selfish young woman meddles in the love lives of her friends.

recommendations.title: Tramps
recommendations.overview: A young man and woman find love in an unlikely place while carrying out a shady deal.

recommendations.title: Jack Goes Boating
recommendations.overview: A limo driver's blind date sparks a tale of love, betrayal, friendship and grace—centered on two working-class New York City couples.
